repo.description: Marketing site for MonGPT, an AI chat + voice support agent targeting Asian-language markets. Static Next.js export deployed to Cloudflare Pages, with 25+ free SEO tools as a traffic engine, geo-locale redirects, and hreflang-clustered localized pages across 8 languages.

cards.title: Add security headers in Cloudflare middleware
cards.rationale: Edge middleware sets zero security headers — trivial hardening at no cost.
bullets: Append headers before returning next() in onRequest handler
Also set Strict-Transport-Security for HTTPS enforcement

cards.title: Add mobile hamburger menu to header
cards.rationale: Nav links are hidden below md breakpoint with no fallback — mobile users can't navigate.
bullets: Header.tsx hides nav behind hidden md:flex with no mobile toggle
Add a client-side slide-down drawer for screens under 768px
Reuse existing locale switcher and CTA buttons in the drawer

cards.title: Add unit tests for markdown converters and sitemap
cards.rationale: Zero test files in repo — pure converter functions are the lowest-hanging coverage.
bullets: Test htmlToMarkdown, csvToMarkdown, jsonToMarkdown, xmlToMarkdown edge cases
Test hreflang cluster logic in sitemap.ts for all 8 locales
Add vitest or node:test runner to package.json scripts

cards.title: Add competitor comparison pages
cards.rationale: Chatbase and Dante AI rank for 'vs' queries — MonGPT has zero comparison pages.
bullets: Create /compare/[slug]/ routes mirroring the tools footer-mesh pattern
Ship Chatbase, Botpress, Intercom comparisons with feature tables
Add SoftwareApplication schema via existing JsonLd component

cards.title: Add interactive demo chat on homepage
cards.rationale: HomePage has no try-it-now section — visitors can't experience the product before signup.
bullets: Embed a clickable sample conversation showing multilingual responses
Reuse DemoWidget loading pattern when NEXT_PUBLIC_DEMO_TENANT_ID is set
Add language-switcher chips so visitors see Hindi, Tamil, Japanese replies

cards.title: Add email capture on free tool pages
cards.rationale: 25+ tool pages drive SEO traffic but capture zero leads — massive leakage.
bullets: Add contextual CTA in ToolShell after result output renders
Offer 'Send results to your inbox' in exchange for email
Wire to existing /api/demo or app signup endpoint via apiBase()
